selections.name: Greenwell
selections.reason: Ran a stellar second on debut at Churchill Downs with an 82 Beyer. Casse and Jose Ortiz team up for a major win threat.

selections.name: Powerline
selections.reason: Highly regarded Flightline colt debuting for Asmussen and Santana. Working forwardly.

selections.name: The Good Life
selections.reason: Brad Cox firster by Life Is Good. Franco aboard, showing solid morning moves.

selections.name: Got Tough
selections.reason: City of Light colt debuting from the rail. Needs to break sharply to contend.

danger_horse.name: Let Em Know
danger_horse.reason: Beckman firster by Jackie's Warrior, Velazquez takes the mount; could surprise.

selections.name: Spoiler
selections.reason: Maker-trained veteran in peak form. Santana stays aboard; fits perfectly in this claiming spot.

selections.name: Bernin Hot
selections.reason: Linda Rice drop-down. Possesses high speed figures and will appreciate the class relief.

selections.name: My Noble Knight
selections.reason: Consistent check earner with tactical speed. Ortiz is a major upgrade.

selections.name: Reynolds Channel
selections.reason: Amelia Green trainee with solid minor award credentials at this level.

danger_horse.name: Brazenly
danger_horse.reason: Lezcano hops aboard this veteran who can surprise if the pace collapses.

selections.name: The Toy Cannon
selections.reason: Linda Dixon trainee coming off a massive win on a wet track. Speed figures tower over these.

selections.name: Come Full Circle
selections.reason: Stalker style fits the 7-furlong distance perfectly. Franco takes the reins.

selections.name: Apollo Code
selections.reason: Consistent performer drawing a beneficial outside post. Tactical speed asset.

selections.name: Solo Jim
selections.reason: Hennig trainee must avoid getting pinned from the inside rail but has class.

danger_horse.name: Sebastianthe First
danger_horse.reason: Delgado runner who can hit the board if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Spiced Up
selections.reason: Mott-trained elite turf sprinter who narrowly missed last out at Saratoga. Top choice.

selections.name: Shape Note
selections.reason: Extremely consistent Maker runner with tactical speed and a recent 94 Beyer.

selections.name: Vettriano
selections.reason: Linda Rice trainee with high speed figures; dangerous if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Dhabab (ire)
selections.reason: Vaughan trainee with solid class who can easily hit the board.

danger_horse.name: War Stride
danger_horse.reason: Weaver runner who has the late kick to surprise if the front runners duel.

selections.name: Portfolio Duration (gb)
selections.reason: Chad Brown Grade 1 winner in peak form. Franco stays aboard; the one to beat.

selections.name: Kathynmarissa
selections.reason: Extremely consistent G1 performer with tactical speed. Ortiz takes the mount.

selections.name: Segesta
selections.reason: G1 Jenny Wiley winner who loves this distance. Dylan Davis aboard.

selections.name: Dynamic Pricing (ire)
selections.reason: Solid backup for the Brown barn; can easily land in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Cathedral (gb)
danger_horse.reason: Stakes-placed runner who could spice up the trifecta at a price.

selections.name: Dr. Kapur
selections.reason: Saffie Joseph trainee dropping out of stakes company. High class potential.

selections.name: Agoo
selections.reason: Consistent performer with excellent tactical speed. Velazquez takes the mount.

selections.name: Tab At Zanzibar
selections.reason: Cox trainee who won debut impressively. Massive upside.

selections.name: Five Wishes
selections.reason: Summers trainee with a solid late kick; fits well here.

danger_horse.name: Caldo Candy
danger_horse.reason: Abreu runner who can hit the board if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Effusive
selections.reason: Brad Cox firster by Into Mischief. Working lights out; top rider Franco aboard.

selections.name: Energy Flows
selections.reason: Experience edge after a solid debut second at Churchill Downs.

selections.name: Elevated
selections.reason: Flightline filly debuting for Mott. High expectations and training well.

selections.name: Cruising Again
selections.reason: Romans trainee with a solid pedigree; can win with firsters.

danger_horse.name: Mel Went Home
danger_horse.reason: Medina trainee who could surprise if she gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Cy Fair
selections.reason: The class of the field. Heavy favorite who won G3 Mamzelle in style.

selections.name: Sapphire Beach (ire)
selections.reason: Rapidly improving Arnold trainee who is very dangerous on the grass.

selections.name: Hot Currency
selections.reason: High early speed asset who handles the turf well. Linda Rice/Franco.

selections.name: Niche
selections.reason: Atras trainee who is a solid minor award candidate in this spot.

danger_horse.name: Cadenza
danger_horse.reason: Cox trainee who could spice up the exotics if she gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Gadget Play
selections.reason: Stall trainee coming off a huge second on debut at Churchill Downs. Ready to win.

selections.name: Criteria
selections.reason: Consistent Chad Brown runner who handles the Saratoga track well.

selections.name: Stimulate
selections.reason: High-priced Tapit colt debuting for Mott. Training forwardly.

selections.name: Noble Edition
selections.reason: Solid debut effort for Cox and Franco; eligible to improve.

danger_horse.name: Mo The Merrier
danger_horse.reason: McPeek trainee who could surprise if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Annexperience
selections.reason: Hard-knocking Englehart trainee with excellent tactical speed. Top choice.

selections.name: Whittington Park
selections.reason: Classy veteran who loves Saratoga and always runs his race. Franco aboard.

selections.name: Elysian Meadows
selections.reason: Solid Mott connections; fits well here and Alvarado takes the mount.

selections.name: Berning Beauty
selections.reason: Baker trainee who can sneak into the exotics at a decent price.

danger_horse.name: King's Leap
danger_horse.reason: Ferraro trainee who could surprise if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Smooth Breeze
selections.reason: Abreu trainee who is very consistent on the turf. Ortiz takes the mount.

selections.name: Jack And Jim
selections.reason: High quality Motion trainee who is dangerous off the layoff. Franco aboard.

selections.name: Conman
selections.reason: Morley trainee with solid tactical speed; fits well here.

selections.name: Leon Blue
selections.reason: Giddings trainee who can hit the board at a decent price.

danger_horse.name: Clear Conscience
danger_horse.reason: Amelia Green trainee who could surprise if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Red Velvet Cake
selections.reason: Giddings trainee with the best speed figures; ready to graduate.

selections.name: Aperitif
selections.reason: Consistent turf sprinter who is always in the mix. Rodriguez aboard.

selections.name: Combat Move
selections.reason: Linda Rice firster with a huge turf pedigree. Ortiz takes the mount.

selections.name: Daylight Dreamer
selections.reason: Englehart trainee who is a solid minor award candidate in this spot.

danger_horse.name: My Lil Army Girl
danger_horse.reason: De Paz trainee who could surprise if she gets a clean trip.
